decision.deployment_review_candidate_reason: Highest current-tail OOS return after full live-equivalent validation; still Sharpe<1, so not deployment-ready under the new Sharpe complaint.
decision.new_alpha_family_decision: No taker-flow exhaustion variant passed live-equivalent train/val/OOS gate; do not promote.
notes: No full-engine candidate achieved Sharpe >= 1; this is recorded as a failure to meet the stricter user demand, not papered over.
Best OOS-return candidate remains the ETH 12h shock incumbent at +0.8284% OOS.
Funding-hour guard improved OOS Sharpe by 10.51% and reduced OOS MDD by 36.93% versus incumbent, but OOS return fell by 13.01%.
No gross exposure increase was used; all new modes keep the same 0.8% target allocation cap / $175 max order cap, with diversified mode weights summing to 1.0.
Backtests were executed one portfolio mode at a time; no duplicate full backtest process was present before launches.
decision.sharpe_focused_shadow_reason: Funding-window entry exclusion improved OOS Sharpe and drawdown versus incumbent at identical cap, but lowered OOS return and still far below Sharpe 1.

selection_contract.rejected_backtest_policy: save rejected hypothesis and reason; do not threshold-mine in full backtest

external_alpha_screen_all5_corrected.note: Corrected flow denominator guard removes missing-flow/NaN funding survivors for BNB/TRX/TRX-like no-flow rows.

external_sources.title: Binance USDⓈ-M Futures: Open Interest Statistics
external_sources.use: Confirmed OI replay is an external derivative-state feature family, but current train/val history is too short for old claims.

external_sources.title: Binance USDⓈ-M Futures: Taker Buy/Sell Volume
external_sources.use: Used to constrain taker-flow ideas to symbols with nonzero raw feature support; BNB/TRX missing flow were rejected.

external_sources.title: Binance USDⓈ-M Futures: Funding Rate History
external_sources.use: Informed funding-settlement-hour entry exclusions around 00/08/16 UTC and adjacent windows.

external_sources.title: arXiv 2212.06888: Crypto perpetual futures / funding context
external_sources.use: Background support for funding/crowding/perpetual-market alpha families; not used as promotion evidence.

filtered_hourly_shock_reversion_screen.interpretation: Raw trade-level Sharpe was useful only for screening; promotion was decided by full live-equivalent engine Sharpe/OOS evidence.
filtered_hourly_shock_reversion_screen.thesis: External microstructure-informed filter screen: taker-flow exhaustion/reversal, funding crowding, OI expansion, BTC counter-trend guard, funding-hour exclusion, and realized-vol cap layered on hourly shock reversion.

selection_contract.full_backtest_rule: one mode at a time after stateful raw-first screen survival
selection_contract.promotion_gate: complete train/val/OOS raw-first coverage, positive train/val/OOS, OOS > prior +0.2910%, positive OOS Sharpe/Sortino, zero liquidations
selection_contract.sizing_rule: target_allocation held at 0.008; max_order_value held at 175

profit_moonshot_filtered_shock_reversion.decision_reason: SOL post-funding sleeve did not survive engine realism; partial fills/turnover caused weak OOS Sharpe and higher MDD.
profit_moonshot_filtered_shock_reversion.label: rejected diversified filtered sleeve

profit_moonshot_hourly_shock_reversion_e.decision_reason: Lower 0.8% trigger matched validation but diluted train/OOS edge; OOS return and Sharpe below incumbent.
profit_moonshot_hourly_shock_reversion_e.label: rejected dense trigger

profit_moonshot_hourly_shock_reversion_e.decision_reason: Funding-window entry exclusion improved OOS Sharpe and drawdown versus incumbent at identical cap, but lowered OOS return and still far below Sharpe 1.
profit_moonshot_hourly_shock_reversion_e.label: new Sharpe/MDD-improved shadow

profit_moonshot_hourly_shock_reversion_e.decision_reason: Highest current-tail OOS return after full live-equivalent validation; still Sharpe<1, so not deployment-ready under the new Sharpe complaint.
profit_moonshot_hourly_shock_reversion_e.label: current OOS-return best / deployment-review only

profit_moonshot_hourly_shock_reversion_e.decision_reason: Positive but OOS return below the prior weak +0.2910% bar.
profit_moonshot_hourly_shock_reversion_e.label: rejected 4h shock probe

profit_moonshot_leadlag_slow_diffusion_m.decision_reason: Positive but OOS MDD is too high and Sharpe is near zero; only a weak bar to beat.
profit_moonshot_leadlag_slow_diffusion_m.label: weak positive shadow baseline

profit_moonshot_leadlag_slow_diffusion_s.reject_reason: OOS return/sharpe/sortino negative; train MDD 19.6453% too high.

profit_moonshot_momentum_hybrid_safe_mod.decision_reason: Validation positive but train and OOS are negative; not promotable.
profit_moonshot_momentum_hybrid_safe_mod.label: conservative fallback only / OOS failed

new_alpha_followup.decision: No taker-flow exhaustion variant passed live-equivalent train/val/OOS gate; do not promote.
external_basis: Binance taker buy/sell quote volume feature replay
Binance funding-rate cap and settlement-hour risk filters
Perpetual futures crowding/order-flow reversal background literature

failure_explanations.profit_moonshot_taker_flow_exhaustion_et: Rejected: wider exits increased train loss and kept val/OOS negative.
Rejected: 7-day live-equivalent chunk phase left val/OOS with zero trades; raw cadence screen was not live-equivalent.
Rejected: validation was barely positive, but train and OOS were negative after fees/one-position realism.
Rejected: cooldown reduced churn but train/val/OOS all remained negative.

risk_controls_added: true taker-flow feature required; no OHLCV proxy fallback for promotion claims
volatility-scaled target allocation under the same 0.8% / $175 cap
wide 12h hold replay and 12h cooldown variant tested to reduce churn/fee risk
new_alpha_followup.thesis: Taker-flow exhaustion reversal: fade same-direction price extension and aggressive taker imbalance only under funding/volatility/session risk filters. Inspired by order-flow predictability/reversal literature and Binance taker-flow/funding fields.

failed_modes.profit_moonshot_filtered_shock_reversion: SOL post-funding sleeve did not survive engine realism; partial fills/turnover caused weak OOS Sharpe and higher MDD.
failed_modes.profit_moonshot_hourly_shock_reversion_e: Lower 0.8% trigger matched validation but diluted train/OOS edge; OOS return and Sharpe below incumbent.

sharpe_followup.result: No honest Sharpe>=1 full-engine candidate found.
sharpe_followup.user_complaint: Sharpe below 1 is not acceptable; find/build stronger filters and use external material.

support_inventory_notes.index_price: Collector now uses pair param for indexPriceKlines; older sparse symbols reflect Binance response history or earlier collector state.
support_inventory_notes.liquidation: Rows may be zero where Binance futures liquidation endpoint is unavailable/returns HTTP 400.
support_inventory_notes.open_interest: Long-range chunking and empty-window skip are applied; rows reflect what Binance currently returns for each symbol.
